headline: Vertex Insider Sales Versus Valuation Gap Raise Investor Questions
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:VRTX) executives, including the CEO and CMO, recently sold company stock under pre-approved Rule 10b5-1 trading plans. The transactions involved planned share sales executed over a defined period, as disclosed in regulatory filings. The activity represents a material insider trading event because it involves multiple top leaders and has been formally reported to investors. Vertex focuses on treatments for serious diseases, with an established presence in...
